model.description: ID of the model to use. You can use the List Models API to see all available models, or see the Model overview for descriptions.

input.description: Input text to embed, encoded as a string or array of tokens. To embed multiple inputs in a single request, pass an array of strings or array of token arrays. The input must not exceed the max input tokens for the model.

encoding_format.description: The format to return the embeddings in. Can be either float or base64. Defaults to float.

dimensions.description: The number of dimensions the resulting output embeddings should have. Only supported in text-embedding-3 and later models.

user.description: A unique identifier representing your end-user, which can help OpenAI to monitor and detect abuse.
